body: # Pull Request ## Description This PR introduces new blog posts and services content, ensuring it is prominently displayed on the frontend. It includes resolutions for merge conflicts in core page files (`About.tsx`, `Services.tsx`, `Tools.tsx`) and updates to `tsconfig.json` for improved React type resolution. The build artifacts, including the main CSS file, have been updated as a result of these changes. ## Type of Change - [x] New feature (adding content) - [x] Bug fix (resolving merge conflicts, TS config fix) - [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to not work as expected) - [ ] Documentation update - [ ] Refactoring (no functional changes) - [ ] Performance improvement - [ ] Security fix ## Testing - [x] I have tested this change locally - [ ] I have added tests for this change - [x] All existing tests pass (Build passes; linting was skipped due to configuration issues) - [x] I have tested the build process ## Checklist - [ ] My code follows the project's style guidelines - [x] I have performed a self-review of my code - [ ] I have commented my code, particularly in hard-to-understand areas - [ ] I have made corresponding changes to the documentation - [ ] My changes generate no new warnings (Linting was skipped) - [ ] I have added tests that prove my fix is effective or that my feature works - [ ] New and existing unit tests pass locally with my changes (Only build success confirmed) - [ ] Any dependent changes have been merged and published ## Screenshots (if applicable) Add screenshots to help explain your changes. ## Additional Notes This PR is for the feature branch `cursor/create-and-deploy-new-content-68d6`. An attempt to merge into `main` locally encountered upstream changes, leading to a rebase flow with conflicts. The rebase needs finalization, which will involve keeping our versions of content files and taking `dist/index.html` from `origin/main`. Linting was skipped during the build process due to existing configuration issues. ---

title: Create and deploy new content
body: # Pull Request ## Description This PR significantly expands the website's content portfolio by adding new blog posts, case studies, and service offerings. To enhance content discovery and user engagement, a new `NewContentShowcase2025` component has been integrated into the homepage, dynamically advertising the latest additions. Additionally, new routes for the main case studies and services pages have been added to the router. ## Type of Change - [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue) - [x] New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality) - [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to not work as expected) - [ ] Documentation update - [ ] Refactoring (no functional changes) - [ ] Performance improvement - [ ] Security fix ## Testing - [x] I have tested this change locally - [ ] I have added tests for this change - [x] All existing tests pass - [ ] I have tested the build process ## Checklist - [x] My code follows the project's style guidelines - [x] I have performed a self-review of my code - [x] I have commented my code, particularly in hard-to-understand areas - [ ] I have made corresponding changes to the documentation - [x] My changes generate no new warnings - [ ] I have added tests that prove my fix is effective or that my feature works - [x] New and existing unit tests pass locally with my changes - [ ] Any dependent changes have been merged and published ## Screenshots (if applicable) N/A ## Additional Notes This PR introduces: * **4 New Blog Posts**: Covering Edge AI, AI Ethics, Quantum AI, and AI for Sustainability. * **6 New Case Studies**: Showcasing success in autonomous vehicles, healthcare, smart cities, banking, logistics, and energy. * **5 New Service Offerings**: Including AI Autonomous Infrastructure, Edge AI Computing, Quantum AI Optimization, AI for Sustainability, and AI Ethics & Governance. * **Dynamic Content Showcase**: A new component on the homepage to highlight these latest additions with rotating banners and featured content. * **Router Updates**: New routes for `/case-studies` and `/services` for improved navigation. ---

title: Create and deploy new content
body: # Pull Request ## Description This PR introduces significant new content and enhances existing pages, along with prominent advertising on the homepage. Key changes include: - **New Blog Articles:** - `AI Trends 2026` (`/blog/ai-trends-2026/`) - `AI Operational Excellence 2026` (`/blog/ai-operational-excellence-2026/`) - *Existing page significantly expanded.* - **New Case Study:** - `Manufacturing IoT Automation` (`/case-studies/manufacturing-iot-automation/`) - *Existing page significantly expanded.* - **Promotional Banners:** Added 10 new promotional banners (e.g., `AI2026TrendsBanner`, `AIOperationalExcellenceBanner`, `ManufacturingIOTAutomationBanner`) to `components/PromotionalBanner.tsx` and integrated them into the homepage (`app/page.tsx`). - **Homepage Updates:** The homepage (`app/page.tsx`) has been updated to display these new promotional banners and new content cards in the "Latest Insights" and "Newsletter" sections to advertise the new articles and case studies. These changes aim to provide more comprehensive and up-to-date content for users, particularly focusing on 2026 AI trends and operational excellence, and to ensure this new content is prominently featured on the site's frontend. ## Type of Change - [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue) - [x] New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality) - [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to not work as expected) - [x] Documentation update - [ ] Refactoring (no functional changes) - [ ] Performance improvement - [ ] Security fix ## Testing - [x] I have tested this change locally - [ ] I have added tests for this change - [ ] All existing tests pass - [ ] I have tested the build process ## Checklist - [ ] My code follows the project's style guidelines - [ ] I have performed a self-review of my code - [ ] I have commented my code, particularly in hard-to-understand areas - [ ] I have made corresponding changes to the documentation - [ ] My changes generate no new warnings - [ ] I have added tests that prove my fix is effective or that my feature works - [ ] New and existing unit tests pass locally with my changes - [ ] Any dependent changes have been merged and published ## Screenshots (if applicable) N/A ## Additional Notes The new content pages (`AI Trends 2026`, `AI Operational Excellence 2026`, `Manufacturing IoT Automation`) include updated metadata for SEO and a modern, responsive design. The promotional banners are designed to be auto-hiding after a set duration. ---
